data OptionA { .some(A), .none }
fn mk() { OptionA.some(a) }
---
Data(name="OptionA", variants=["some", "none"])
Fn(name="mk", body=Call(callee=Member(object=Variable("OptionA"), member="some"), args=[Variable("a")]))
==========
data Option[A] { .some(A), .none }
fn id() { a }
---
Data(name="Option", variants=["some", "none"])
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("a"))
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
fn id() { x }
fn keep() { let a = b; a }
---
Data(name="Bool", variants=["true", "false"])
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
Fn(name="keep", body=Block([let a = Variable("b")], result=Variable("a")))
==========

data   X   {   .a ,   .b }

  fn   id()   {   x   }

---
Data(name="X", variants=["a", "b"])
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
data Empty { }
---
Data(name="Empty", variants=[])
==========
data One { .only }
---
Data(name="One", variants=["only"])
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
---
Data(name="Bool", variants=["true", "false"])
==========
data A { .v }
fn f() { x }
data B { .w, .z }
fn g() { let y = x; y }
---
Data(name="A", variants=["v"])
Fn(name="f", body=Variable("x"))
Data(name="B", variants=["w", "z"])
Fn(name="g", body=Block([let y = Variable("x")], result=Variable("y")))
